codeReview.summary: The feature correctly preserves the fresh-boot zero-live 503 gate in runtime state, but it does not satisfy the core requirement to expose usable live snapshots for canonical /simple/price and /simple/token_price on the port-3102 validation profile when snapshots are available. The implementation only changes deferred refresh scheduling in market-runtime and adds runtime-only tests; it leaves the validation bootstrap/import path untouched, and the handoff’s own manual probe still observed 503 responses on 3102.

issues.description: `finalizeBootstrapSuccess` now preserves `initialSyncCompletedWithoutUsableLiveSnapshots` and skips the listener-bound deferred refresh when bootstrap had zero usable live snapshots, but the feature description required the shared validation-runtime/bootstrap path on port 3102 to expose usable live snapshots when they are actually available. This commit never changes the validation bootstrap/import path (`src/app.ts`) that decides whether persisted snapshots are seeded into the validation runtime, so it cannot make 3102 serve live-backed simple-price/token-price payloads in the positive case. The worker handoff confirms the manual 3102 probe still returned the zero-live 503 path.

The new tests only exercise `createMarketRuntime` state transitions in isolation and do not cover the owned externally observable behavior on the validation profile (`buildApp`/port 3102 serving canonical `/simple/price` and `/simple/token_price`). Existing parity tests were merely re-run unchanged, so the feature lacks characterization proving that seeded validation snapshots become visible on the actual validation surface when available.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `runtime-provider-worker` skill says to manually verify startup on the mission port plus the affected hot endpoints and diagnostics after runtime changes, but this worker’s transcript shows only a negative manual probe (still 503 on 3102) and no successful positive-case validation with usable snapshots. For this class of validation-runtime feature, the skill could more explicitly require proving both branches: zero-live preservation and seeded-live success on the manifest-managed validation surface.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/runtime-provider-worker/SKILL.md steps 8-10 require targeted tests and live probes; handoff `2026-03-28T07-10-27-347Z__simple-price-validation-runtime-prep__b2362962-d607-4724-9a93-ef6807f42233.json` reports the 3102 manual probe still returned 503 because no usable snapshots were loaded, with the positive branch verified only via isolated runtime tests.

summary: Fail: the commit hardens zero-live gating but does not implement or verify the required 3102 validation-runtime behavior of exposing live snapshots to canonical simple-price/token-price requests when snapshots are available.
